title: ロイヤルプリンセスハンドプレス☆

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh, I still have some time left before training.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I know. Why don't I put on a fruit face mask
before I go? ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, a princess must maintain her elegance with
proper skin care!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ There really is nothing like smashing a
pineapple with your bare hands!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not done yet! I need to mash it up even
more—really squeeze out those beauty-boosting
ingredients!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! I'm such a dummy! I've destroyed the whole
thing!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
No! A princess never gives up! There are still
plenty of pineapples left!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Gyaah! The juice squirted into my eyes! One more
time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess gets so caught up in her
fruit-smashing undertaking that she completely
forgets to come to training...
